---
name: Skill content suggestion
about: Suggest a fix, addition, or correction to an existing skill
title: "[Skill] "
labels: skill-content
assignees: ''
---

## Which skill

<!-- Name the skill — e.g. r-tdd, r-shiny, r-clinical. -->

## What's wrong, missing, or unclear

<!-- A plain-prose description. Examples:
- "The r-tdd skill recommends `expect_equal()` for floating-point comparisons,
  but `expect_equal(tolerance = ...)` is needed in testthat 3e."
- "r-clinical doesn't mention the admiral package's ADaM utilities, which is
  the modern standard."
- "The r-shiny SKILL.md example uses `observeEvent` without `ignoreInit`, which
  fires on app load and confuses beginners." -->

## Suggested change

<!-- Describe what should be added, removed, or changed. You don't need to
draft the actual content — describing the right behaviour is enough. -->

## References

<!-- Links the maintainer can verify against:
- CRAN package docs / vignettes
- testthat / shiny / admiral / etc. official documentation
- R-bloggers posts, Posit blog posts
- Books (R for Data Science, Mastering Shiny, Advanced R, etc.) -->

## Real-world context (optional)

<!-- "I hit this on a Robyn Blain MHSc consulting project where I needed
to..." — concrete usage stories help prioritise. -->
